name: nexova-site
description: Nexova public website — landing page and talent registration form.

scripts.prepare:public: rm -rf public && mkdir -p public && cp index.html application.html index.es.html application.es.html styles.css validation.js validation.es.js public/
scripts.build:vercel: npm run build && npm run prepare:public
scripts.dev: npm run watch & npm run serve
